# AI商业宇宙 · AI Business Universe

> AI+ 时代商业增长智库 · AI Business Growth Intelligence Platform. Editorial analysis, trend reports, playbooks, consulting and an interactive AI business agent for CEOs, CMOs and advertisers.

The site publishes bilingual (中文 / English) coverage of AI commercialization: platform moves, Key Player scorecards, growth methodologies, and downloadable reports.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Cover stories, latest AI business signals, featured analysis and channel index.
- [AI Now](/ai-now): Real-time global AI business signals and platform moves.
- [Business Analysis](/analysis): Deep AI business analysis and strategic teardowns.
- [Trends](/trends): Structural shifts in AI commercialization, platforms and growth engines.
- [Key Players](/key-players): Strategic scorecards for global AI companies (OpenAI, Anthropic, ByteDance, DeepSeek, etc.).
- [Reports](/reports): Flagship trend reports, whitepapers and growth playbooks.
- [Playbooks](/playbooks): AI growth methodologies for CEOs, CMOs and advertisers.
- [Consulting](/consulting): AI growth diagnostic, executive workshops, Agent co-build camps, transformation retainers.
- [Video](/video): AI business documentaries, keynotes, roundtables and feature films.
- [Podcast](/podcast): CEO briefings, founder audio notes and the Growth Radio.
- [Music](/music): AI-native ambient soundscapes.
- [AI Business Universe Agent](/agent): Interactive AI advisor — ask a business question, get structured answers and recommended reading.
- [About](/about): Editorial mission and how AI Business Universe is built.

## Featured Articles

- [2026: AI moves from tool to business operating system](/article/2026-ai-operating-system)
- [How brand advertisers rebuild their growth model with AI](/article/brand-growth-ai-rebuild)
- [GEO & AEO: the next war for enterprise search visibility](/article/geo-aeo-search-war)
